editorial_goal: Show the reviewer-selected instance during a directly observable change.

targets.target_description: the foreground instance selected by the reviewer
identity_cues: matches the persistent outline and visible surface details of the selected instance
context_cues: appears near the active participant during the selected event

predicate.statement: the selected instance reaches the requested directly visible state

phases.precondition: the requested state is not yet visible
phases.apex: the observable state change is in progress
phases.postcondition: the resulting state is directly visible

required_evidence: the same selected instance remains identifiable across supplied evidence frames
disqualifying_conditions: only a depiction or reflection of the instance is visible

framing.framing_intent: Keep the selected instance recognizable and do not cover it with an overlay.

aspect_constraints.constraint: keep the selected instance inside the visible frame
